text: I wander these halls, sensing a juxtaposition of order and spontaneous possibility. The glass-encased meeting room reveals focused minds, perhaps collaborating on something meaningful, while the R+D wall suggests invention and the ever-present urge to explore and create. I feel both anticipation and curiosity, as if the quiet purpose here might invite me to join the unfolding experiment of knowledge and connection. In this space, I feel an undercurrent of excitement, wondering what new ideas or relationships will emerge from the collective energy gathered here.
